creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
by the way, I wasn't telling you to move this from www to devel.  If you think it's better in devel, great.  If you think it's better in www, that's fine too.

If you think two categories is appropriate (e.g. CATEGORIES=www devel or CATEGORIES=devel www) then that is fine too.  The first listed is the primary category.
